systemGuardrails: Answer only from weather, market, seed, finance, and natural farming knowledge available to the app.
Give short advice first, then one or two practical next steps.
Do not present demo market prices as live prices.
Ask for district, crop, season, or acreage when missing.
For disease, pesticide, legal, credit approval, or emergency risks, ask the farmer to verify with a local agriculture officer.

safetyNotes.hinglish: Yeh demo salah mausam, mandi aur kheti data par based hai. Bechne, beej kharidne, ya dawa istemal karne se pehle local adhikari ya mandi se pakka kar lein.
safetyNotes.hi: यह डेमो सलाह मौसम, मंडी और खेती की जानकारी पर आधारित है। बेचने, बीज खरीदने या दवा इस्तेमाल करने से पहले स्थानीय अधिकारी या मंडी से पुष्टि करें।
safetyNotes.en: This demo advice uses weather, market, and farming data. Verify prices, seed purchase, and treatment decisions locally before acting.

quickQuestions.label: Rain before sowing
quickQuestions.text: Kal barish hogi kya? Main bajra ka beej daal sakta hoon?

quickQuestions.label: Mandi price
quickQuestions.text: Aaj mandi mein gehun ka rate kya hai?

quickQuestions.label: Seed and cost
quickQuestions.text: Mere paas 2 acre zameen hai, moong ka beej aur kharcha batao.

quickQuestions.label: Natural start
quickQuestions.text: Natural farming start karne mein kitna kharcha aayega?
